title: Unauthenticated visitor is redirected from a protected route
description: This verifies that a signed-out visitor cannot access protected student content and is sent back to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /student/drives
Verify the login page is displayed
Verify protected student content is not displayed

title: Eligible student can apply for a drive
description: This verifies a student can confirm eligibility, apply for an eligible drive, and see the application reflected in the drive view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to view available drives
Open a drive from the list
Check eligibility for the drive
Apply for the drive
Verify the application is reflected in the drive view

title: Student can sign in and reach the student dashboard
description: This verifies a student can sign in successfully and land on the student dashboard after authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the student dashboard is displayed

title: Student can access the student drives area
description: This verifies that a student can log in and successfully open the student placement drives area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the student drives area
Verify student drives content is displayed

title: New student can create an account and reach the student dashboard
description: This verifies a new student can register successfully and is routed to the student dashboard afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the name field with a new student name
Fill in the email field with a new student email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the branch field with a valid branch
Fill in the CGPA field with a valid CGPA
Submit the registration form
Verify the student dashboard is displayed

title: Student is blocked from coordinator routes
description: This verifies that a student cannot access coordinator-only placement management screens.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the coordinator drives area
Verify access to the coordinator portal is blocked
Verify coordinator content is not displayed

title: Student sees an invalid login error
description: This verifies a student receives an invalid credentials error when submitting incorrect sign-in details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid credentials
Fill in the password field with invalid credentials
Submit the sign-in form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible

title: Student can browse drives and open a drive detail
description: This verifies a student can view open drives and open a drive to review its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to view available drives
Open a drive from the list
Verify drive details are displayed

title: Admin can access the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that an admin can log in and reach the institution-wide admin portal.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the admin dashboard
Verify admin analytics content is displayed

title: Create a drive as a coordinator
description: This verifies that a coordinator can create a placement drive and see it appear in the drives list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the drive management navigation link
Open the create drive form
Fill in the required drive details
Save the drive
Verify the new drive appears in the drives list

title: Schedule an interview with required meeting details
description: This verifies that a coordinator can schedule an interview for an application and see the new interview in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the interview management navigation link
Open the scheduling form
Choose an application
Select a valid interview date
Select a valid interview time
Select the interview mode
Fill in the meeting link when required
Submit the interview schedule
Verify the new interview appears in the scheduled interviews list

title: Ineligible or already-applied student cannot apply to a drive
description: This verifies the drive detail view prevents applying when the student is ineligible or has already applied.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to view available drives
Open a drive from the list
Check eligibility for the drive
Verify applying is unavailable

title: Create a company as a coordinator
description: This verifies that a coordinator can add a new company and see it appear in the company list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the company management navigation link
Open the add company form
Fill in the required company details
Save the company
Verify the new company appears in the company list

title: Student can review submitted applications and open one
description: This verifies a student can view their application list with status indicators and open an application detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to view applications
Open an application from the list
Verify the application timeline is displayed
Verify application details are displayed

title: Update a drive applicant's status
description: This verifies that a coordinator can review drive applicants and update an applicant's status from the applicants list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the drive management navigation link
Open a drive's applicants list
Update an applicant's status
Verify the applicant's updated status is displayed in the list

title: Record interview feedback and result
description: This verifies that a coordinator can update an interview with feedback and a result and see the saved record reflected.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the interview management navigation link
Open an existing interview
Fill in interview feedback
Select an interview result
Save the interview update
Verify the interview record shows the saved feedback and result

title: Student sees dashboard summaries and charts
description: This verifies that a student can open the dashboard and view their placement summary information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the student dashboard
Verify placement summary information is displayed
Verify a dashboard chart is displayed

title: Student can withdraw an application that is still eligible for withdrawal
description: This verifies a student can withdraw an allowed application and see the status update in the detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to view applications
Open an application that can still be withdrawn
Withdraw the application
Verify the application status is updated

title: Close an open drive
description: This verifies that a coordinator can close an open drive and see the drive status update in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the drive management navigation link
Open an existing open drive
Close the drive
Verify the drive is shown as closed

title: Coordinator sees dashboard placement metrics
description: This verifies that a coordinator can open the coordinator dashboard and view placement metrics.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the coordinator dashboard
Verify placement metrics are displayed
Verify a summary chart is displayed

title: Admin sees institution analytics on the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that an admin can open analytics and view institution-wide placement metrics.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the analytics dashboard
Verify institution-wide analytics are displayed
Verify placement metrics are displayed

title: Sync a coding profile and see updated stats
description: This verifies that a student can add a supported coding platform username, sync the profile, and see their coding statistics update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the coding profile navigation link
Fill in a supported coding platform username
Sync the selected platform profile
Verify updated coding statistics are displayed

title: Student can open notifications inbox and mark one item as read
description: This verifies that a student can review notifications, open a notification, and clear its unread state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the notifications inbox
Open a notification
Mark the notification as read
Verify the notification is shown as read

title: Student can request a password reset
description: This verifies a student can submit a password reset request and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the reset request form
Verify a generic success confirmation is visible

title: Student can mark all notifications as read
description: This verifies that a student can clear unread notifications in bulk and see the inbox update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the notifications inbox
Mark all notifications as read
Verify the inbox shows no unread notifications

title: Sync all coding profiles and see the combined summary
description: This verifies that a student can sync every available coding profile and see a combined summary of the synced accounts.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the coding profile navigation link
Fill in supported usernames for the available coding platforms
Sync all available profiles
Verify a combined synced summary is displayed
